config.leave_confirm: You have unsaved changes. Leave and discard them?
config.restart_confirm: Saving restarts AutoBangumi to apply the new settings. Continue?

downloader_set.aria2_hint: For aria2, enter the RPC secret in the password field (username is ignored). Host example: 172.17.0.1:6800
downloader_set.title: Downloader Setting

llm_set.hint: The openai provider works with any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (DeepSeek, Ollama, LM Studio, OpenRouter, etc.). claude-haiku-4-5 and gemini-2.5-flash are economical choices.
llm_set.models_failed: Failed to fetch the model list — check the API key (and Base URL).
llm_set.title: LLM Parser
llm_set.not_installed: This provider is not installed yet.
llm_set.risk_notice: This provider uses an unofficial subscription flow. Third-party use may violate the vendor's terms and could get your account restricted. Continue at your own risk.
llm_set.auth_open_link: Open this link on any device, authorize, then paste the code below:
llm_set.auth_paste_code: Paste the code or redirect URL here
llm_set.auth_device_hint: Open this link and enter the code to authorize:

security_set.title: Security
security_set.hint: Login whitelist: empty = allow all IPs. MCP whitelist: empty = deny all access.

search_provider_set.title: Search Provider
search_provider_set.name: Name
search_provider_set.url_hint: Use %s as placeholder for search keywords in the URL
search_provider_set.url_missing_placeholder: URL must contain %s as search keyword placeholder
search_provider_set.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this provider?
search_provider_set.passkey_placeholder: Passkey from the site's user control panel
search_provider_set.nexusphp_hint: Builds a torrentrss.php search template from your passkey. Note: stock NexusPHP ignores the search parameter and always returns the latest torrents — verify on your site that RSS search actually filters results.
search_provider_set.category_id_invalid: Category IDs must be numeric (comma-separated for multiple)

empty.title: Downloader not configured
empty.subtitle: Connect your download client to manage torrents here
empty.step1_desc: Navigate to the Config page and find the Downloader section.
empty.step2_desc: Set your qBittorrent host address, username, and password.
empty.step3_desc: Once configured, the downloader web UI will be embedded right here.

action.delete_confirm: Remove the selected torrents from the downloader? Downloaded files are kept.

load_failed.title: Could not load your subscriptions
load_failed.subtitle: The backend did not respond. Check that AutoBangumi is running, then retry.

empty.title: No subscriptions yet
empty.subtitle: Get started by adding your first RSS feed
empty.step1_desc: Click the "Add" button in the top bar and paste an RSS link from your anime source.
empty.step2_desc: Go to Config and set up your downloader (e.g. qBittorrent) connection.
empty.step3_desc: AutoBangumi will automatically download and rename new episodes for you.

rule.delete_confirm: This rule will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
rule.enable_hit: Do you want to enable this rule?
rule.preferred_hint: When set, the RSS refresh skips duplicate releases that don't match while a preferred one exists.
rule.select_hint: Multiple rules found for this anime. Select one to edit:

torrents.title: Torrents
torrents.confirm_clear: Are you sure you want to delete all torrents? This cannot be undone.

log.empty: No log entries yet. The log fills up once background tasks start running.
log.filtered_empty: No entries match the current filters.
log.reset_confirm: Clear the log? This cannot be undone.
log.title: Log

update.title: Software Update
update.up_to_date: You are on the latest version.
update.rollback_confirm: Roll back to the previous version? The app will restart.
update.confirm_body: The update will be downloaded and applied, then the app will restart to take effect.
update.restart_note: In-app update needs the container to run with `restart: unless-stopped` so it can restart itself to apply the update.
update.restarting: Applying update and restarting… this page will reload automatically.
update.restart_timeout: The app is taking a while to come back. Make sure the container runs with `restart: unless-stopped`, or restart it manually.
update.applied_overlay: Running an updated overlay (v{version}) on top of the image.

passkey.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this passkey?
passkey.not_supported: Your browser does not support Passkeys
passkey.register_hint: After clicking confirm, follow your browser's prompts to complete authentication.
passkey.title: Passkey Settings

notify.copy_failed: Your browser does not support Clipboard API!
notify.password_length_error: Password must be at least 8 characters long!

player.hit: Please set up the media player

empty.title: Media player not configured
empty.subtitle: Connect your media server to stream directly from here
empty.step1_desc: Navigate to the Config page and find the Media Player section.
empty.step2_desc: Enter the URL of your media server (Jellyfin, Emby, Plex, etc.).
empty.step3_desc: Your media player will be embedded here for easy access.

rss.delete_confirm: Delete the selected RSS feeds? Existing rules and downloads are kept.
rss.name: Name
rss.title: RSS Item

calendar.subtitle: This season's broadcast schedule
calendar.no_search_results: No results found. Try different keywords.

empty_state.title: No Schedule Yet
empty_state.subtitle: Click refresh to fetch this season's broadcast data

welcome.title: Welcome to AutoBangumi
welcome.subtitle: Let's set up your anime downloading system.
welcome.description: This wizard will guide you through the initial configuration. You can skip optional steps and configure them later.

account.title: Create Your Account
account.subtitle: Change the default credentials for security.
account.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
account.username_too_short: Username must be at least 4 characters

downloader.title: Download Client
downloader.subtitle: Connect to your qBittorrent instance.
downloader.untested_hint: You can continue without a successful test and adjust the connection later in Config.

rss.title: RSS Source
rss.subtitle: Add your first anime RSS feed.

media.title: Media Library
media.subtitle: Configure the download and organization path.
media.path_hint: Episodes will be organized into subdirectories automatically.

review.title: Review Settings
review.subtitle: Confirm your configuration before completing setup.
review.success: Setup complete! Please log in with your new credentials.

offset.reason_season_mismatch: RSS shows S{parsed}, but TMDB only has {total} season(s)
offset.reason_episode_exceeded: Episode {ep} exceeds TMDB count of {count} for this season

search.no_results: No results found. Try different keywords.
search.failed_hint: Search failed. Check the connection and try again.

confirm.title: Add Subscription
confirm.subtitle: Subtitle Type
confirm.filter_hint: Regex patterns to exclude unwanted torrents

reason.unreachable: Cannot connect to the downloader. Check the host, port and network.
reason.credentials: Username or password rejected. Check the downloader credentials in settings.
reason.banned: IP banned by the downloader. Unban it in the downloader WebUI or restart the downloader.

update_applied.title: Update applied
update_applied.body: Updated to {version}. It takes effect after restart.
